title: CMake fails to download oneapi-tbb due to unresolvable storage.openvinotoolkit.org hostname
error_summary: CMake failed to download oneapi-tbb-2021.13.2-win.zip from storage.openvinotoolkit.org with curl error 6 (COULDNT_RESOLVE_HOST). Build configuration was incomplete.
root_cause: Network/DNS failure: storage.openvinotoolkit.org hostname could not be resolved on the Windows runner. This is a transient infrastructure issue unrelated to the PR changes.
